CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Continued To Aug-17-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-18-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

James Parks, Esq. appeared for plaintiff DeVito Law Group, a partnership.
Defendant Binoye Naku, MD was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was filed on May 12, 2009.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Parks. In accordance with the terms of said agreement, the parties stipulate for entry of judgment against defendant Binoye Naku, MD in the amount of $28,885.00. Defendant Binoye Naku, MD shall notice plaintiff of his (defendant's) reinstatement of employment within fourteen (14) days of said reinstatement. Mr. Naku shall provide plaintiff notice of hearing on back pay within fourteen (14) days of said hearing, and Mr. Naku shall provide plaintiff with notice of receipt of back pay, within fourteen (14) days of receipt of back pay. Additionally, defendant Binoye Naku, MD shall pay plaintiff @14,442.50 within thirty (30) days of receipt of back pay. Defendant Binoye Naku, MC shall pay plaintiff the balance of $14,442.50 within ninety (90) days of receipt of back pay. If defendant complies with the terms of this agreement, plaintiff shall dismiss this action, with prejudice, upon receipt of the second installment payment of $14,442.50.

If defendant Binoye Naku, MD fails to adhere to the terms of the agreement set forth above, plaintiff may seek immediate entry of judgment for the full amount of $28,885.00, plus attorney fees & costs.

Mr. Naku was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and his understanding of the agreement.

This agreement shall be reduced to writing by Mr. Parks. Agreement of the parties was accepted by the Court.

Matter is continued to May 18, 2010 @ 10:00 on the CRC 3.1386 Dismissal Calendar in Department 212.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
